CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id UInt32, vector Array(Float64));
SELECT LpNorm(vector, 2) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT LpNorm(vector, 1) FROM test_vectors WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT LpNorm(vector, 3) AS norm FROM test_vectors;
SELECT id, LpNorm(vector, 2) FROM test_vectors WHERE LpNorm(vector, 2) > 2;
SELECT id, LpNorm(vector, 2) FROM test_vectors ORDER BY LpNorm(vector, 2);
SELECT vector, LpNorm(vector, 2) AS norm FROM test_vectors WHERE norm IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id UInt32, value Float64);
SELECT t.id, LpNorm(t.vector, 2) AS norm FROM test_vectors t JOIN additional_data a ON t.id = a.id WHERE a.value < 3;
SELECT LpNorm((SELECT arrayAgg(value) FROM additional_data WHERE value > 1), 2);
SELECT id, LpNorm((SELECT arrayMap(x -> x * 2, vector) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = t.id), 2) FROM test_vectors t;
